VALUES: 
61 = Care Improvement Model 1 is used

COMMENT: 
There are 4 of these Care Improvement Model fields (CLM_CARE_IMPRVMT_MODEL_CD1–
CLM_CARE_IMPRVMT_MODEL_CD4). 
This field was new in 2013 and is null/missing for all previous years.
